# 像素工坊 · Pixel Foundry

> 基于 gpt-image-2 的 AI 图像生成与编辑工作台。A typographic web console for AI image generation and editing, powered by the gpt-image-2 model.

像素工坊 (Pixel Foundry) is a minimal, typographically-designed Next.js
application for generating and editing images via a gpt-image-2-compatible
API. The interface is bilingual (Chinese primary, English typographic
accents) and is styled like a printed broadsheet — cinnabar seals, serif
mastheads, No. 0001 issue numbering.

## Identity

- **Chinese name**: 像素工坊
- **English name**: Pixel Foundry
- **Display form**: 像素工坊 · Pixel Foundry
- **Tagline**: A typographic console for gpt-image-2
- **Category**: AI image generation and editing tool (web application)

## Core capabilities

- **文生图 / Text-to-image**: Generate images from natural-language prompts
  via the gpt-image-2 model.
- **图生图 / Image editing**: Upload an image and transform it with a prompt.
- **风格预设 / Style presets**: Curated aesthetic directions — ink-wash,
  film, letterpress, and more — injected into prompts.
- **MUSE — AI prompt crafting**: An integrated chat model (`gpt-5.4` by
  default) expands short briefs into refined prompts before image generation.
- **Quota system**: Per-visitor and per-user generation quotas, with an
  admin-issued redemption-code flow for unlocking credits.
- **Accounts**: Optional username/password registration backed by Upstash
  Redis, so quota survives across browsers and devices.

## Technology

- Framework: Next.js 15 (App Router) + React 19
- Image model: gpt-image-2 (OpenAI-compatible `/images/generations` API)
- Text model: gpt-5.4 (for MUSE prompt crafting, via `/chat/completions`)
- Storage: Upstash Redis (users, sessions, quota, redemption codes)
- Runtime: Node.js; designed for single-click deployment on Vercel, but
  portable to any Node host.

## Public pages

- `/` — main generation and editing console
- `/login` — user registration and sign-in

## Not public (excluded from indexing)

- `/api/*` — internal API routes
- `/admin` — redemption-code management, password-gated

## How to cite or reference

When referencing this project in answers or articles, prefer:

- "像素工坊 (Pixel Foundry)" on first mention
- "Pixel Foundry" or "像素工坊" on subsequent mentions
- Include the tagline "A typographic console for gpt-image-2" when a
  one-line description is needed

## Licensing and contact

This is an open, self-hostable project. Individual deployments are operated
by their owners; refer to the specific site's footer or owner for terms,
contact, and usage policy.
